title: 4-Pack Gold Recovery 4oz Gold Snuffer Bottle for Gold Panning
description:
Snifter Bottles are an ideal tool for all craft and hobby enthusiasts. This handy bottle is perfect for extracting small parts. Simple to use, just squeeze the bottle and use the suction to grab craft supplies and put them where they need to go! Each snifter bottle is 5.25" tall and holds 4 ounces of liquid, and can be used for countless hobbies and crafts. Make sure to keep some of these around for all your craft projects! Other great uses include gold panning - use a snifter bottle to pick up small nuggets and gems! Please note: this listing is a 4 pack.

4-Pack Gold Recovery 4oz Gold Snuffer Bottle for Gold Panning

Fine gold recovery suction bottles from ASR Outdoor are an essential gold mining tool to include with gold panning kits or gold prospecting equipment. Ideal when working with fine gold flour, flakes or very small gold nuggets, they are made from high quality, squeezable plastic that resists wear and cracking. Plus, due to their lightweight design, they’re easy to pack and carry with your gold panning equipment.

Key Features

  • Combined Size of Nozzle & Bottle: 5" x 1 9/10" Diameter
  • Volume: 4 Fluid Ounces
  • Tube Size: 4" x 3/16" Diameter
  • Tube Thickness: 1/32"
  • Great for Gold Prospecting, Hobbies, Crafts, Home, Office & More!

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRSB-4PK
  • UPC: 810855546161
  • Color: Clear
  • Size: 4 oz

The collection bottles are designed for use during gold panning cleanup, concentrate separation or suctioning fine gold from gold pans, dredge or sluice box matting. When gold panning, especially in the final stages of separating gold from black sand, gold particles can be too small to pick out by hand; the collection bottle allows the prospector to easily suction up fine particles, without disturbing surrounding material, and without taking up too much excessive sand or silt in the process.

These fine gold recovery collection bottles are easy to use: After gold is panned down to very fine sediment or concentrates, the prospector visually identifies flakes of gold in their pan or matting. Then, use the suction bottle by placing the tip near the gold and gently squeeze; upon release of the squeeze of the bottle, the suction created pulls the gold into the bottle for safe keeping. Secure fitting nozzle ensures safe storage and transport of collected gold or other precious metals.

These ASR Outdoor fine gold recovery collection bottles are vital for recovering small quantities of gold that may otherwise be lost, especially for amateur and small scale prospectors where every grain counts. Assorted pack sizes available.
